history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Indonesian man with dark, styled hair and a neutral expression sits with his arms crossed, looking directly at the camera. He is wearing a black, ribbed long-sleeved shirt and a white smartwatch on his left wrist. The background features a wooden lattice window with lush green foliage and plants visible through the panes. To the left of the man is a textured stone wall. In the foreground, on a white table, are a clear ribbed glass with a black straw, a white tissue box, and a black handbag with a gold chain. The lighting is soft and natural, suggesting an outdoor or well-lit indoor setting, creating a relaxed and candid atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by natural greens, browns, and the black and white of the subject's clothing and accessories. The overall mood is calm and contemplative.
